name: An exponentially averaged Vasyunin formula
title: An exponentially averaged Vasyunin formula
abstract: Proves a Vasyunin-type formula for an autocorrelation function in a probabilistic Nyman–Beurling setting, also interpretable as a cotangent-sum reciprocity formula.
findings: Downloaded as an alternative classical route. Its exponentially averaged formula should be compared with the BCF taper before any Lean formalization is planned.
